risks.title: Token count estimation vs actual token count
risks.mitigation: Use character-based approximation (chars/4) for token estimation — standard heuristic for LLM context budgeting. No tiktoken dependency required.

risks.title: Regression in existing rag-search tests
risks.mitigation: Flag is additive — no existing code path changes when --max-tokens is absent. Run full test suite after edit.

decision_records.what: Use character/4 approximation for token count, not tiktoken
decision_records.rationale: tiktoken is an optional peer dep; adding a hard dep for a rough truncation budget is over-engineering. chars/4 is standard and sufficient for context-window management.

decision_records.what: Truncate per-result content field, not the entire output string
decision_records.rationale: Per-result truncation gives cleaner output — each result displays proportionally rather than getting cut off mid-result.
decision_records.outcome: Truncation applied in formatResult() or at result iteration, not to final stdout
